use_cases: Pre-launch waitlist pages for SaaS products with animated 3D backgrounds
Countdown timers for product launches with email capture functionality
Marketing landing pages with real-time countdown and waitlist signup
ai_summary: A visually striking landing page component combining 3D WebGL animations with a real-time countdown timer and email capture form. Built with Three.js for animated tube geometry backgrounds, featuring a modern dark aesthetic ideal for product launches and pre-launch campaigns requiring high visual impact and user engagement.
